query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines FROM users u LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON u.id = up.userId WHERE up.userId IS NOT NULL ORDER BY u.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines FROM users u LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON u.id = up.userId WHERE up.userId IS NOT NULL ORDER BY u.id;
